purpose: Authorize materialization of conveyor character facades through SEJ and resolver receipts.

canonicalNodes.statement: Conveyor runner facade must be materialized through materialize-conveyor-runner-node SEJ.
Lane-worker facade must be materialized through materialize-lane-workers-node SEJ.
Evidence inspector facade must be materialized through materialize-evidence-inspector-node SEJ.
Shipper facade must be materialized through materialize-shipper-node SEJ.
Telemetry observer facade must be materialized through materialize-telemetry-observer-node SEJ.

rules.statement: Generated conveyor character facades must delegate to resolver contracts and must not own product truth.
Every materialized facade requires a node projection receipt and conformance receipt.
